belier.intro: The Moon moves into Libra today at 3 degrees, now 30.8 percent illuminated, shifting into your seventh house of partnership after days spent in practical routine. Mercury retrograde continues through your fourth house, still asking for patience with domestic conversations, while Neptune retrograde lingers in your own sign. The Cancer Sun crosses into your fourth house today, bringing emotional focus home just as the Moon turns outward.
belier.love: A partner's perspective matters more than usual today. Balance your own needs with genuine curiosity about theirs; the Libra Moon rewards fairness over insistence.
belier.work: Negotiations and collaborative decisions benefit from diplomacy today. Seek the middle ground rather than pushing your own view too hard.
belier.energy: Your fire softens into something more relational today, well suited to compromise and shared effort rather than solo pursuit.
belier.intuition: Neptune retrograde continues its slow work in your sign, and today a partner's honest reaction helps you see your own blind spot more clearly.
belier.mantra: I meet others with fairness and genuine curiosity.
belier.author: Sibylle

taureau.intro: The Libra Moon moves into your sixth house of daily routine and service today, shifting attention from creative pleasure toward practical structure. Mercury retrograde continues through your third house, still asking for careful communication about home matters. The Cancer Sun crosses into your third house today, bringing warmth to everyday conversations.
taureau.love: Small, considerate gestures within daily routine speak volumes today. Offer practical balance rather than romantic drama.
taureau.work: Organizing your schedule or workload benefits from a fair, balanced approach today. Divide tasks evenly rather than taking on everything yourself.
taureau.energy: Your steady nature meets a need for balance today. Notice where your routine has tilted too far in one direction and gently correct it.
taureau.intuition: A feeling about fairness in your daily obligations, whether at work or at home, deserves honest attention today.
taureau.mantra: I bring balance to the rhythm of my days.
taureau.author: Sibylle

gemeaux.intro: The Libra Moon moves into your fifth house of creativity and romance today, a welcome airy lightness after days of homebound reflection. Mercury, your ruler, remains retrograde in your own sign, so playful plans may still shift unexpectedly. The Cancer Sun crosses into your second house today, keeping material security part of today's equation.
gemeaux.love: Romance benefits from balance and charm today rather than overthinking. Let a light, fair exchange of affection set the tone.
gemeaux.work: Creative collaboration is favored today, particularly when it involves finding a compromise between two good ideas rather than choosing one.
gemeaux.energy: Your mental energy lightens today, well suited to enjoyable pursuits that do not require heavy decision-making just yet.
gemeaux.intuition: A sense of what genuinely brings you joy, versus what merely looks appealing, becomes clearer today. Trust the quieter, more honest pull.
gemeaux.mantra: I choose joy that feels honestly balanced.
gemeaux.author: Sibylle

cancer.intro: The Sun moves into your fourth house today at nearly 27 degrees, turning your focus toward home just as the Libra Moon enters your fourth house alongside it, doubling the emphasis on foundations and family. Mercury retrograde continues through your twelfth house, still surfacing memory, though with growing resolution. Neptune retrograde in Aries keeps your tenth house of career gently unclear for a little longer.
cancer.love: Home becomes the emotional center of a relationship today. A fair, balanced conversation about domestic life serves you better than avoidance.
cancer.work: Working from or focusing on home matters is favored today. A career decision can wait one more day while you settle your foundations.
cancer.energy: Your emotional steadiness turns homeward today, both Sun and Moon reinforcing the importance of your domestic foundation.
cancer.intuition: A feeling about your family or home life, forming over recent days, reaches a point of real clarity today. Trust what you now understand.
cancer.mantra: I let my foundation hold me steady today.
cancer.author: Sibylle

lion.intro: The Libra Moon moves into your third house of communication today, encouraging balanced, diplomatic words after several days of quiet inward focus. Mercury retrograde remains in your twelfth house, still favoring careful private reflection. The Cancer Sun crosses into your twelfth house today, extending the introspective quality of this personal season one more day.
lion.love: A fair, gentle conversation with someone close serves a relationship well today. Aim for balance rather than persuasion.
lion.work: Short communications and small negotiations move smoothly today. This is a good day to smooth over a recent misunderstanding.
lion.energy: Your vitality finds a lighter, more social outlet today after days of inward renewal. Ease back into engagement gradually.
lion.intuition: Your inner knowing continues to inform your words today. Notice how what you say naturally reflects what you have quietly been feeling.
lion.mantra: I speak the balance I have found within.
lion.author: Sibylle

vierge.intro: The Moon moves into Libra today, shifting into your second house of resources and self-worth after days at home in your own sign. Mercury, your ruler, remains retrograde in your eleventh house, still complicating group plans. The Cancer Sun crosses into your eleventh house today, bringing warmth back to your friendships and community.
vierge.love: A fair discussion about shared resources or mutual give-and-take benefits a relationship today. Balance, not sacrifice, is the healthiest approach.
vierge.work: Financial matters benefit from a diplomatic, balanced approach today. Negotiate rather than simply accept the first offer.
vierge.energy: Your energy shifts from self-focus toward practical balance today. Use the clarity gained from recent days to make a grounded decision.
vierge.intuition: A sense of your own worth, clarified over recent days, now extends naturally into how you value your resources. Trust this connection.
vierge.mantra: I value myself and my resources equally.
vierge.author: Sibylle

balance.intro: The Moon returns to your own sign today at 3 degrees, a fresh and welcome shift after days spent in quiet twelfth house reflection. Mercury retrograde continues through your tenth house, still asking you to revisit rather than initiate career conversations. The Cancer Sun crosses into your tenth house today, adding emotional weight to your public path.
balance.love: Your own needs and sense of fairness come back into focus today with the Moon at home in your sign. Speak up for balance rather than accommodating everyone else first.
balance.work: A career matter reconsidered over recent days is ready for a more active, though still careful, conversation today.
balance.energy: Your energy sharpens and centers today with the Moon in your own sign. Use this renewed clarity to reset your priorities.
balance.intuition: Your sense of fairness and balance is especially reliable today. Trust your instinct about what feels genuinely equitable in a current situation.
balance.mantra: I trust my own sense of fairness and balance.
balance.author: Sibylle

scorpion.intro: The Libra Moon moves into your twelfth house today, drawing attention inward after several days of social and community focus. Mercury retrograde remains in your ninth house, still asking for a second look before finalizing travel, publishing, or educational plans. The Cancer Sun crosses into your ninth house today, keeping meaning and purpose central to your reflection.
scorpion.love: A quiet, private reflection about a relationship serves you better than a public conversation today. Let understanding form before you speak.
scorpion.work: Rest and behind-the-scenes preparation matter more than visible action today. Use this quieter phase to reconsider your long-term direction.
scorpion.energy: Your usual intensity turns inward and gentler today. Honor the need for solitude rather than pushing toward engagement.
scorpion.intuition: A message from a quiet or dreamlike moment today carries real information about your search for meaning. Do not dismiss it.
scorpion.mantra: I let quiet reflection guide my search for meaning.
scorpion.author: Sibylle

sagittaire.intro: The Libra Moon moves into your eleventh house of friendship and future vision today, a welcome social shift after days of career focus. Mercury retrograde continues through your eighth house, still asking for care with shared resources or emotionally weighted conversations. The Cancer Sun crosses into your eighth house today, deepening the emotional undertone of intimate matters.
sagittaire.love: Vulnerability continues to matter in a close relationship today, but a friend's balanced perspective may also offer useful clarity.
sagittaire.work: Community and friendship connections may offer valuable support for a long-term goal today. Stay open to fair, mutual exchange rather than one-sided help.
sagittaire.energy: Your ambition finds good company again today, a social and collaborative mood favoring shared effort.
sagittaire.intuition: A feeling about which friendships and goals are genuinely reciprocal, versus which are not, becomes clearer today.
sagittaire.mantra: I seek connections that give as much as they take.
sagittaire.author: Sibylle

capricorne.intro: The Libra Moon moves into your tenth house of career and public standing today, bringing a diplomatic, balanced energy to professional matters. Mercury retrograde continues through your seventh house, still favoring review over new agreements in partnership. The Cancer Sun crosses into your seventh house today, keeping a significant relationship emotionally central.
capricorne.love: Balance between your professional ambitions and a partner's needs deserves honest attention today. Neither should be sacrificed for the other.
capricorne.work: Diplomatic handling of a career matter serves you well today. Seek fair compromise rather than rigid position-holding.
capricorne.energy: Your steady discipline meets a need for balance today. Notice where ambition has outpaced fairness to yourself or others.
capricorne.intuition: A sense of what is genuinely fair in your professional reputation or a partnership becomes clearer today. Trust this balanced read.
capricorne.mantra: I build my reputation on fairness and balance.
capricorne.author: Sibylle

verseau.intro: The Libra Moon moves into your ninth house of belief and horizon today, a fellow air sign bringing expansive, balanced thinking. Pluto retrograde continues its slow transformation within your own sign. Mercury retrograde continues through your sixth house, still asking for patience with daily routines, while the Cancer Sun crosses into your sixth house today.
verseau.love: A fair, open conversation about differing beliefs or values with a partner is favored today. Seek understanding rather than agreement.
verseau.work: Educational or long-distance matters benefit from a balanced, open-minded approach today. Consider more than one valid perspective.
verseau.energy: Your mind opens toward bigger questions today, a welcome shift after days focused on routine and health.
verseau.intuition: Pluto's ongoing transformation continues, and today a broader perspective helps you see a personal pattern in a new, fairer light.
verseau.mantra: I hold my beliefs with openness and fairness.
verseau.author: Sibylle

poissons.intro: The Libra Moon moves into your eighth house of intimacy and shared resources today, asking for balanced honesty in close bonds. Neptune, your ruler, remains retrograde in Aries within your second house, still clarifying your relationship with worth and security. Mercury retrograde continues through your fifth house, still asking for patience with creative or romantic plans.
poissons.love: A fair, mutual conversation about emotional or financial give-and-take deepens intimacy today. Balance protects the bond more than self-sacrifice does.
poissons.work: A shared financial matter benefits from a diplomatic, balanced approach today. Seek an arrangement that genuinely serves both sides.
poissons.energy: Your sensitive nature meets a need for equilibrium today. Notice where you have been giving more than you have been receiving.
poissons.intuition: Neptune's clarifying work continues, and today a sense of fairness in a close bond helps translate old confusion into a clearer, more honest view.
poissons.mantra: I seek balance in the bonds that matter most.
poissons.author: Sibylle
